view/item/context.when: view in solutionexplorer.viewTypes && viewItem in solutionExplorer.cmdAllowedContexts.copy
view in solutionexplorer.viewTypes && viewItem in solutionExplorer.cmdAllowedContexts.paste && !solutionExplorer.buildInProgress && !solutionExplorer.runOrDebugInProgress
view in solutionexplorer.viewTypes && viewItem in solutionExplorer.cmdAllowedContexts.build && !solutionExplorer.buildInProgress && !solutionExplorer.runOrDebugInProgress
view in solutionexplorer.viewTypes && viewItem in solutionExplorer.cmdAllowedContexts.clean && !solutionExplorer.buildInProgress && !solutionExplorer.runOrDebugInProgress
view in solutionexplorer.viewTypes && viewItem in solutionExplorer.cmdAllowedContexts.pack
view in solutionexplorer.viewTypes && viewItem in solutionExplorer.cmdAllowedContexts.run
view in solutionexplorer.viewTypes && viewItem in solutionExplorer.cmdAllowedContexts.test

keybindings.when: focusedView in solutionexplorer.viewTypes && solutionExplorer.selectionContext in solutionExplorer.cmdAllowedContexts.copy
focusedView in solutionexplorer.viewTypes && solutionExplorer.selectionContext in solutionExplorer.cmdAllowedContexts.paste

vssolution.showMode.description: Show the solution explorer in the activity bar, in the explorer pane or don't show it.

vssolution.solutionExplorerIcons.description:
solution-explorer -> Uses custom icons
mix -> use current theme icons for files and folders
current-theme -> Uses the installed icon theme

vssolution.outputChannelMode.description: The solution explorer output channel mode: show on every single log, append but not show the pane or none

vssolution.showTerminalOnCommand.description: Show the terminal when a command is executed.

vssolution.trackActiveItem.description: Select the active editor file in the solution explorer.

vssolution.netcoreIgnore.description: Folder and filenames to ignore when get a dotnet core project content

vssolution.xxprojItemTypes.description: Type of XML element to put in the xxproj files.

vssolution.xmlspaces.description: Spaces to be used for indenting XML output. It could be a number or an string. ex. "2", " " or "\t".

vssolution.xmlClosingTagSpace.description: Add space at the end of XML closing tag, ex: " />"

vssolution.altSolutionFolders.description: If there is no solution in the workplace root folder, it will search for solutions in any of these folders.

vssolution.lineEndings.description: Controls line endings of solution and project files.

vssolution.itemNesting.description: Sets whether related items will be displayed nested

vssolution.openProjectOnClick.description: Sets whether clicking a project in the explorer tree opens the underlying proj file (i.e. the csproj or fsproj)

vssolution.openProjectInlineButtonShown.description: Sets whether projects in the explorer tree include an inline button to open the underlying project file (i.e. the csproj or fsproj)

vssolution.openSolutions.inRootFolder.description: Sets whether solutions will be automatically loaded from the root folder.

vssolution.openSolutions.inAltFolders.description: Sets whether solutions will be automatically loaded from the altSolutionFolders parameter.

vssolution.openSolutions.inFoldersAndSub.description: Sets whether solutions will be automatically loaded from the current opened folder and subfolders.

vssolution.openSolutions.selectedInOmnis.description: Sets whether solutions will be automatically loaded from the current selected solution in Omnisharp extension.

vssolution.openSolutions.inSettings.description: Sets whether solutions will be automatically loaded from the 'dotnet.defaultSolution' parameter in the settings.json file.

vssolution.msbuildPath.description: Path to MSBuild.exe. Leave empty for auto-detection from Visual Studio installation.

enumDescriptions: Debug build with full debug info
vssolution.msbuildConfiguration.description: Build configuration for MSBuild. Leave empty to auto-detect from project file.

vssolution.msbuildPlatform.description: Target platform for MSBuild. Leave empty to auto-detect from project file.

vssolution.msbuildPlatformToolset.description: Platform Toolset version. Leave empty to auto-detect from installed Visual Studio.

vssolution.msbuildParallelBuild.description: Enable parallel build (/m flag) for MSBuild. Uses all available CPU cores.

vssolution.msbuildAdditionalArgs.description: Additional arguments to pass to MSBuild.

vssolution.projectDebugSettings.description: Per-project debug settings (command args, working directory). Managed by the Configure Project command.

vssolution.nuget.includePrerelease.description: Sets whether to include prerelease packages when searching for NuGet packages.

vssolution.nuget.codeDecorators.description: Sets whether to show NuGet package versions in the code.

vssolution.nuget.codeActions.description: Sets whether to show NuGet package versions in the code actions.

vssolution.nuget.codeCompletions.description: Sets whether to show NuGet package versions and names in the code completions.
